case_title: SEAN SULLIVAN et al VS. FRANK CAFFERKEY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-30-2012 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE, "SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL-DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND/SEVERAL ATTEMPTS MADE-NO RESPONSE". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SULLIVAN, SEAN BATTULA, SIREESHA  D.P.M. AS TO DEFENDANT DINEEN, CAROL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,805.94 FILED BY SULLIVAN, SEAN BATTULA, SIREESHA  D.P.M. AS TO DEFENDANT CAFFERKEY, FRANK DINEEN, CAROL CAFFERKEY, MAUREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO KEVIN CASSIDY, 4002 IRVING ST., SF CA 94122
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED *(PROOF OF SERVICE)* (SERVICE FEE $120.00)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED APR-30-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAFFERKEY, FRANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED MAY-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAFFERKEY, MAUREEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT CAROL DINEEN WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY SULLIVAN, SEAN BATTULA, SIREESHA  D.P.M. CAFFERKEY, FRANK DINEEN, CAROL CAFFERKEY, MAUREEN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SULLIVAN, SEAN BATTULA, SIREESHA  D.P.M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAFFERKEY, FRANK DINEEN, CAROL CAFFERKEY, MAUREEN $1,805.94 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.94, COURT FINDS THE PREMISES WERE NOT PROPERLY SECURED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
